title: Legendary Pokemon Cobblemon
description: This datapacks adds the Legendary Pokemon in Cobblemon, namely Arceus. Because Arceus Form is not yet available in cobblemon so use these datapacks and play!!
body:
Adding Pokemon Legendary Arceus To minecraft Cobblemon

WARNING!!!!
Datapacks will not work if they do not use the Cobblemon mods and the predefined version!!

How to Instal datapacks?

"Please copy the downloaded Datapacks file then paste it in the ResoucePack folder"

"Then open the Minecraft game click Options then Resoucepack and select the Datapacks file that has been installed"

"Then please go back to the main page then click "singleplayer" and click "create new world" then move the menu to the far right that says "more" and click datapacks"

"and the datapacks file that was copied earlier please paste it in the datapacks folder in the minecraft game then select the installed datapacks and click ok after loading please click "CREATE NEW WORLD"

"Command Check Spawn Pokemon"

/checkspawn <rarity>

 EXAMPLE
 
 /checkspawn ultra-rare
 
"Command Get Pokemon Creative Mode"

/pokegive {yourname} {pokemon}

EXAMPLE:

/pokegive username arceus

- **_Arceus spawn in Biome The End with Ultra Rare percentage_**
- **_Raikou spawn in Biome Savanna with Ultra Rare percentage_**

WARNING!!
Please to those of you who downloaded my mods or datapacks please do not modify and share with others!. although I do not have a License but this mod and these datapacks belong to me I beg you with your cooperation

# NOTE!

**If you want to make your Legendary Pokemon in the game more complete, you need additional Datapacks and Resoucepacks. because I just want to add arceus**

### I would only recommend additional datapacks to you guys that you might need
### But remember you also appreciate and support the creators who make the datapacks!!

- MysticMons          By (iMystxc-dev)
- AlolaMons           By (iMystxc-dev,8BallKing666)
- LackingMons         By (Glowmons Dev Team)
- Lugia for Cobblemon By (Valeristt)
